cards.name: 7 of Cups
cards.interpretation: choices, searching for purpose, illusion, fantasy, daydreaming, wishful thinking, indecision

cards.name: 2 of Cups, reversed
cards.interpretation: separation, rejection, division, imbalance, tension, bad communication, withdrawal

cards.name: 2 of Wands, reversed
cards.interpretation: bad planning, overanalyzing, not taking action, playing it safe, avoiding risk
